name: snip
description: Token & context optimizer for Claude Code: one plugin that rewrites Read, Bash, Grep, and Glob output in-flight via hooks. Edit-safe tree-sitter AST Read, zero markdown injected.

plugins.name: snip
plugins.description: Multi-surface token & context optimizer for Claude Code. Hooks Read, Bash, Grep, and Glob and rewrites their output in-flight: edit-safe tree-sitter AST Read across 29 languages, Bash/Grep/Glob output rewriting, recoverable overflow, and net-token honesty. Zero markdown injected, no MCP tools to learn.
